description: Replay of the hosted Gemini forecast smoke failure where free-text forecast narrative leaked a non-roster alias.

contributing_factors: Language-heavy content with four EAL students requiring varying levels of support
Amira and Ari's documented difficulty initiating writing tasks
blocks.suggested_mitigation: Provide sentence frames and visual step cards to Amira and Ari before the assembly transition.

raw_response.overall_summary: Morning complexity is driven by the assembly and language supports for Amira and Ari.
